__package__.yml.rawContents:
types:
  CreateCompletionRequest:
    properties:
      prompt: string
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  CompletionChunk:
    properties:
      text: optional<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

createInheritsResumable.docs: SSE endpoint that inherits resumable=true from the document-level config.

createOptedOut.docs: SSE endpoint that overrides the document-level default to opt out.

chatCompletions.yml.rawContents:
imports:
  root: __package__.yml
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    createInheritsResumable:
      path: /completions/chat
      method: POST
      docs: >-
        SSE endpoint that inherits resumable=true from the document-level
        config.
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        body: root.CreateCompletionRequest
        content-type: application/json
      response-stream:
        docs: Success!
        type: root.CompletionChunk
        format: sse
        resumable: true
      examples:
        - request:
            prompt: prompt
          response:
            stream:
              - event: ''
                data:
                  text: text
    createOptedOut:
      path: /completions/chat-no-resume
      method: POST
      docs: SSE endpoint that overrides the document-level default to opt out.
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      request:
        body: root.CreateCompletionRequest
        content-type: application/json
      response-stream:
        docs: Success!
        type: root.CompletionChunk
        format: sse
        resumable: false
      examples:
        - request:
            prompt: prompt
          response:
            stream:
              - event: ''
                data:
                  text: text
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml

contents.display-name: Test x-fern-streaming.resumable document-level inheritance and per-endpoint override.
contents.name: api

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: >-
  Test x-fern-streaming.resumable document-level inheritance and per-endpoint
  override.
